title: References in Revised Statutes
doc_html:
§14. References in Revised Statutes

           Unless otherwise indicated in the context, references in the Revised Statutes to Titles, Sub-titles, Chapters, Parts, Subparts, or Sections shall mean Titles, Subtitles, Chapters, Parts, Sub-parts, or Sections of the Revised Statutes.

           Whenever any reference is made to any portion of the Revised Statutes or to any other law, the reference applies to all amendments thereto hereafter made.
doc_text:
§14.  References in Revised Statutes
Unless otherwise indicated in the context, references in the Revised
Statutes to Titles, Sub-titles, Chapters, Parts, Subparts, or Sections shall mean
Titles, Subtitles, Chapters, Parts, Sub-parts, or Sections of the Revised
Statutes.
Whenever any reference is made to any portion of the Revised Statutes
or to any other law, the reference applies to all amendments thereto hereafter
made.
